source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Stick Insect
identity.motif: bark brown moss green twig grey

typography: Geist for precise operational UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact data tables, steady numeric rhythm, and quiet multilingual controls.
layout: Minimal tooling system with 8px radii, branch-line dividers, bark-grain texture samples, lichen focus rings, compact navigation, dashboard/data density, and twig-grey control edges.

prompts.label: Transparent Motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image_gen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local remove_chroma_key alpha extraction.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a stick insect, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: An accurate woodland branch stick insect with long twig-like body, bark-brown segmented limbs, twig grey highlights, fine moss-green lichen flecks, delicate antennae, crisp narrow silhouette edges, subtle natural texture like a dry branch. Keep the insect believable and elegant, not cartoonish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the entire insect, all legs and antennae fully visible without cropping; slight diagonal pose that reads as a living twig.
Lighting/mood: clean neutral studio light that preserves bark texture, moss-green detail, twig grey joints, and fine anatomical structure.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no branch perch, no forest background, no leaves, no second insect, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Stick Insect", derived from the visible stick insect motif: bark-brown twig body, moss-green lichen flecks, twig-grey joints, woodland branch camouflage, minimal tooling system.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent stick insect motif as the visual source. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from bark ridges, branch segmentation, lichen flecks, twig grey joints, and quiet woodland branch camouflage.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape board, 3840x2160 design intent, high-resolution source image, readable when scaled down; crisp UI mockup, not a website landing page.
Required visible sections: Morphous Stick Insect, Stick Insect, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; visible labels should include Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line and bar charts, table rows, command/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, precise grid, minimal tooling system, quiet operational UI, compact controls, component radius 8px or less, fine branch-line dividers, bark-grain texture samples, lichen-green focus rings, twig-grey borders, moss-filtered success states, dry-branch neutral surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: pale bark paper, warm bark brown, deep bark ink, moss green, lichen chartreuse, twig grey, branch taupe, dry shadow, cambium tan, soft woodland ivory.
Board layout: organized full board with a large motif cutout preview, left palette rail, central component matrix, right data/navigation/forms panels, bottom token strip. Keep labels short, large, and readable.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no saturated candy palette, no rounded cards above 8px radius, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Stick Insect" or "Stick Insect".

prompts.label: Dark Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Stick Insect" / "Stick Insect". Translate the visible light-mode Morphous Stick Insect board into dark mode; keep it recognizably the same system, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible stick insect motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Stick Insect board as strict references for palette roles, section coverage, board organization, bark-grain texture rhythm, lichen focus states, twig-grey borders, compact controls, and 8px radii.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape board, 3840x2160 design intent, high-resolution source image, readable when scaled down; crisp UI mockup, not a website landing page.
Required visible sections: Morphous Stick Insect, Stick Insect, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep bark ink and dry shadow; readable text in soft woodland ivory and pale bark paper; warm bark brown as primary action; moss green and lichen chartreuse as support and focus colors; twig grey borders; cambium tan highlights; branch-line dividers; subtle bark-grain panel texture; quiet minimal tooling system; compact shadcn/tweakcn-style controls; component radius 8px or less.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance with short readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line and bar charts, table rows, command/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow samples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals: deep bark ink, dry shadow, bark brown, branch taupe, twig grey, moss green, lichen chartreuse, cambium tan, pale bark paper, soft woodland ivory.
Board layout: organized full board matching the light version: motif preview, palette rail, central component matrix, navigation/dashboard/forms panels, table/command/status panels, bottom token strip with radius, spacing, shadows, texture.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; avoid paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated insects, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon palette, no pure black flat-only background, no rounded cards above 8px radius, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Stick Insect" or "Stick Insect".
